Class DefaultPluginManager

java.lang.Object
org.fireflyframework.plugin.core.DefaultPluginManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
public class DefaultPluginManager extends Object implements org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
Default implementation of PluginManager. Manages the complete lifecycle of plugins including loading, starting, stopping, and unloading.
